changes.value:
## What

`kanban-app/ui/src/components/nav-bar.tsx` uses HTML `title=` on two buttons instead of shadcn Tooltip:
- Line 49: `title="Inspect board"`
- Line 67: `title="Search"`

Replace both with `<Tooltip><TooltipTrigger asChild>...<TooltipContent>`.

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/nav-bar.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both buttons show styled Radix tooltips on hover
- [ ] No HTML `title=` attributes remain in nav-bar.tsx

## Tests
- [ ] Run `cd kanban-app && pnpm vitest run` — all tests pass
- [ ] Manual: hover over inspect and search buttons, verify styled tooltip
Replace title= with shadcn Tooltip in nav-bar.tsx

+## What

Replace HTML `title=` on inspect and search buttons with shadcn Tooltip.

**MANDATORY: TDD — write/update tests FIRST (RED), then implement (GREEN).**

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/nav-bar.test.tsx` — update selectors from `getByTitle` to `getByLabelText`, add hover tooltip assertion
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/nav-bar.tsx` — replace `title=` with Tooltip + `aria-label`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests updated FIRST (RED), then code changed (GREEN)
- [ ] Styled tooltips on hover
- [ ] No HTML `title=` in nav-bar.tsx

## Tests
- [ ] Updated nav-bar.test.tsx selectors (RED first)
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run nav-bar` — all pass"
\ No newline at end of file
